description: A one-sentence description of what this demo shows.

_field_docs.title: Required. Human-readable name shown in gallery and detail page.
_field_docs.description: Required. Brief summary shown on the demo card and in meta tags.
_field_docs.tags: Array of lowercase kebab-case tags for filtering (e.g. 'animation', 'text').
_field_docs.author: Optional. Your name or handle.
_field_docs.dateCreated: Optional. ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when the demo was first written.
_field_docs.dateUpdated: Optional. ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last significant update.
_field_docs.browserSupport: Which browsers currently run this demo. Set to true once verified.
_field_docs._field_docs: DELETE THIS BLOCK before submitting — it is only for reference.
